statusLegend.yes: Supported directly by the published PBPK MCP workflow.
statusLegend.conditional: Supported only when the model or request satisfies declared capability conditions.
statusLegend.no: Not part of the published workflow for this input class.

entries.label: PK-Sim / MoBi transfer file (.pkml)
notes: Optional sidecars can enrich qualification metadata and parameter provenance.
Population simulation is not exposed as a generic OSPSuite .pkml capability in the current public contract.

entries.label: Contract-complete MCP-ready R model (.R)
notes: Population workflows depend on the model declaring the population capability and implementing the required runtime hook.
Richer OECD-oriented evidence can be supplied through module hooks and companion bundles.

entries.label: Discoverable but incomplete R module (.R)
notes: An .R file may still appear in discovery before it satisfies the expected PBPK MCP hook contract.
validate_model_manifest is the intended pre-load surface for diagnosing missing hooks and dossier gaps.

entries.label: PK-Sim project file (.pksim5)
notes: Export the project to .pkml before runtime use.

entries.label: Berkeley Madonna source model (.mmd)
notes: Convert the model to .pkml or an MCP-ready .R module before runtime use.
